request.description:
Add or update rating for a shop.

Required Fields:
- shopId: Shop ID
- rating: 1-5 (integer)
- review: Text review (optional, max 500 chars)

Business Rules:
- One rating per customer per shop
- If rating exists, it will be updated

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Rating added",
  "data": {...}
}
